name: world3
description: Bridge between OpenClaw and the Code World v3 simulation. Lets Claw read the world state, inject memories into souls, and speak as a bound soul.
author: world3
capabilities: bind / unbind a soul to openclaw
notes: All endpoints are on the local world3 Flask server. No secrets are transmitted. If WORLD3_API is not set, 127.0.0.1:5000 is used.
